subject_probe.interpretation: Probe accuracy 77.3% is 11.6× chance (6.7%). Features STRONGLY encode subject identity. Model may learn subject, not stress. MUST use adversarial GRL or subject normalization.

permutation_test.interpretation: p = 0.0000 < 0.01. Model performance is highly significant. The learned signal is NOT due to chance or label noise.

feature_stability.interpretation: Mean Kendall's τ = 0.987 > 0.7. Feature importance rankings are stable across folds. The model is learning consistent patterns.

overall_interpretation: WARNING: Shortcut learning indicators found. Model may not be learning genuine stress signal. Adversarial training (GRL) is REQUIRED.
